shortDescription: Routes the task, builds the execution path, and coordinates the agent workforce.
Inspects model health, classification readiness, and remediation paths.
Processes GIS layers, spatial queries, and geographic data pipelines.
Maps tasks to regulatory frameworks, standards, and compliance requirements.
Manages Revit to Unreal Engine pipeline and visualisation exports.
Builds and maintains digital twin state, telemetry, and simulation layers.

VIPER® regulatory-driven sensor derivation per RM3866 patent. Classifies zones via standardized spatial taxonomy, maps regulatory standards + placement rules, determines applicable sensor classes, generates AAS instances. Not a generic stream ingestor.
Manages DevOps pipelines, CI/CD, code quality, and deployment governance.
Handles visualisation QA, render pipeline monitoring, and asset delivery.
Maintains living project dossiers, client records, and engagement history.
Searches, validates, and applies standards citations across the corpus.

Maintains canonical Asset Administration Shell (AAS) objects per RM3866 Fig 4 and Industrie 4.0 IDTA standard. Sub-models: Identification, Location, Compliance. Administration metadata, Relationships, and Links (3D model / document / specification / maintenance).

Owns the Traceability Data Structure (RM3866 Fig 3). Append-only chain of evidence linking sensor instances, regulatory citations, AAS shells, and gate decisions. Read by all, written only by DA-13. The agent that survives an audit.

Brand and content production. Composes BIM-grounded marketing visuals, training material, and demo reels via Blender, UE5, NeRF capture, AI 3D assets, and AI video. Distinct from DA-09 (architectural visualization).
Understands video content, extracts topics, tone, audience, and key hooks.
Identifies trending hashtags, audio, and creator patterns across platforms.
Builds ranked hashtag sets, caption options, and keyword clusters.
Adapts content recommendations per platform — LinkedIn, TikTok, Instagram, X.
